titleStmt.title: SII 25.282: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 282. (A.R. No. 282 of 1908.) SAṄKARANAYIṈĀR KŌYIL, SANKARANAYINAR KOYIL TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in front of the Śaṅkaranayiṉār temple.
This inscription furnishes the details of date viz., Kali 4962, Śaka 1783, Kollam 1036, Duṟmati, Aṟpaśi, Wednesday śu 13, Uttiraṭṭādi-nakshatra corresponding to 1861 A.D., October 16, ·34.

It states that under the orders of Tāhsīldār Gōvindaṉāyakkar the utsava images of goddess, sabhāṇāyakkar, etc., were caused to be cast as per the āgamic conception and śilpaśāstra when the jeṭibandana and reconsecration ceremony are stated to have been performed. A silver pedestal for procession was prepared and the makara festival was conducted for the prosperity and growth of the heirs of the above nāyakkar.
This was written by Vaikuṇṭa Aḷagappaṉāchāri.
The details of date when the reconsecration was done correspond to 1862 A.D., February 3, f.d.t. ·11.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§
Ampikai muṉṉaṟakka
tirunāmam puṉṉāka vaṉattil paramecupari
kku yiruruvum Oruruvāyt tericaṉa
m pālittu tavakkuṟaivu nālavatarittama
ṇikkiripaṉ kaiṅkiriyattu ṉālukkiṟa pāṇ
ṭiyaṟkut tericaṉam yintu Āvuṭaiyammaṉ
cametarāy niṟttañceykiṉṟa caṅkaraliṅ
kam cai Ālaiyattiluḷḷa yāvaṟkkum
vāṉa(ṅ)kaḷariyumpaṭi yeḷutiyatu civakiri jamiṉ
śrī varakuṇaṟāmappāṇṭiya ciṉṉat tam
miyāravaṟkaḷt taṟmakaṟttā vicāra
ṇaiyil tiricirapura mukuntaṉāyakkara
vaṟkaḷarun tavattiṉālavataritta taṟma
cintaṉaiyuṭaiya jīvarattiṉa pakkuvaciṉoma
ṇi yeṉṉum śrīkovintaṉāyakkaravar
kaḷ tācilatikārattilavaṟkaḷāl Uccapa mu
rttiyākiya Ammaṉ cuvāmi tiruvuruvum capāṉā
yakaṟ mutalāṉa Āparaṇatevatai ceṭipīṭa
m yāvum curuti Ākama pirakāram cirppacāt
tirappaṭikki vāṟppiccu kaliyukam
4 1000 9 100 6 10 2l cāliyavākaṉa cakāṟttam 1000 100 8 10 3
varuṣam kkuc cellāṉiṉṟa kollam 3 1000 7 100 8 10 6
varuṣam tuṟmati varuṣam Aṟpaci mātam 2 putaṉvāṟamu pūṟuvapaṭ
cam tiṟaiyoteciyu Uttiraṭṭāti naṭcettiramu
kumpalakkaṉamu kūṭiṉa cupatiṉattil
yettiṉittu varuṣam Uttaṟāyaṇamāṇatai
mātam 2 10 3 nāḷ comavāramu pūṟuvapaṭcam pañcami
Uttiraṭṭāti naṭcettiramu miṉalakkaṉamu
kiḷattaṅkoṇṭu cupatiṉattil ceṭipan
taṉa kumpā Apiceka mutal naṭappittu
veḷḷi cappaṟamuñ ceytu makara Uccapam na
ṭantu varukitu nāyakkaravaṟkaḷ puttira pā
ram paraiyāy viṟttiyāki varumpaṭi caṅkara
liṅkam Āvuṭaiyammaṉ Ācīrvatittār
kaḷ 2 ciṟpam vaikuṇṭa Aḷakappaṉācāri cuka
sta likitam §
Digital edition of SII 25.282 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
